## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss growth strategies and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX approaching 2K monthly visitors, significant growth since January](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Exec's AI roleplay platform has unique depth and capabilities vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [New growth strategies discussed: comparison blogs, industry-specific landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Upcoming product updates: self-serve signup, auto-customized scenarios by industry](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Marketing Progress

  - [Nearly 2K monthly visitors (28-day period), substantial growth since January](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Strong LLM referrals from various sources (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [SEMrush showing increased keyword rankings and first-page SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Potential strategy: create "top 10" style content to target competitor keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Recommendation to place brand mentions/lists higher in articles for better LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Plan to remove competitor (Utili) from existing "best of" lists](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Considering new L\&D and AI combination content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

### Exec Product Demo

  - [Showcased ease of creating detailed AI roleplay scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Highlighted unique features: deep character backstories, situational triggers](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Demonstrated program orchestration capabilities and analytics dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Previewed upcoming features: industry-specific scenario customization, self-serve signup](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

### Marketing Ideas

  - [Explore creating comparison blogs to highlight Exec's unique features](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Consider adding interactive widgets or scenario previews to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Possibility of showcasing AI-to-AI roleplay demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)

### AI Technology Discussion

  - [Exec using GPT-4 for conversational aspects, preferring personality over pure reasoning](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Using Eleven Labs for voice synthesis, awaiting optimization of new high-fidelity model](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Remove AI feedback cluster from Profound and update AI roleplay focus](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Explore creating an L\&D and AI combinations content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Update existing "best of" article to move brand mentions higher and remove Utili](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Work on comparison blogs to highlight Exec's unique features vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Investigate adding interactive scenario previews or widgets to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/ccWaTJyAxUMX3-RPJaHju1QexkSrP9jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
